path.pathed.blademaster.description: Born for question. Your blade is your answer to everything; strike first and ask questions later.
path.pathed.blademaster.name: Blademaster
path.pathed.cultivator.description: Patient and resourceful. You coax life from the earth itself and replenish for more.
path.pathed.cultivator.name: Cultivator
path.pathed.excavator.description: Reshape the world one scoop at a time, the land is all yours.
path.pathed.excavator.name: Excavator
path.pathed.excavator.tool_description: Every world begins with a hole.
path.pathed.human.name: Human
path.pathed.lumberjack.description: The forest bends to your will. Your axe in hand, no tree stands long.
path.pathed.lumberjack.name: Lumberjack
path.pathed.lumberjack.tool_description: The trees knew it was coming.
path.pathed.spelunker.description: A master of the deep. Thrive underground as the surface holds little for you.
path.pathed.spelunker.name: Spelunker
path.pathed.spelunker.tool_description: It remembers every cave it has touched.
pathed.gui.choose_path.title: Choose your Path
